---
title: "nitrix.stats.glm"
generated: true
signature-hash: cdea06d7b5bb266c
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.stats.glm` (signatures only). Replace the
skeletons with authored prose; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5).
`check_reference_staleness.py` flags this page if the underlying
signatures drift from this stub.
:::

## `Family` {#Family}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `Link` {#Link}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `IDENTITY_LINK` {#IDENTITY_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `LOG_LINK` {#LOG_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `LOGIT_LINK` {#LOGIT_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `PROBIT_LINK` {#PROBIT_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `CLOGLOG_LINK` {#CLOGLOG_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `SQRT_LINK` {#SQRT_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `INVERSE_LINK` {#INVERSE_LINK}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `resolve_family` {#resolve_family}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `resolve_link` {#resolve_link}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `GAUSSIAN` {#GAUSSIAN}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `BINOMIAL` {#BINOMIAL}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `POISSON` {#POISSON}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `GAMMA` {#GAMMA}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `NEGBINOMIAL` {#NEGBINOMIAL}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `TWEEDIE` {#TWEEDIE}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `negbinomial` {#negbinomial}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `tweedie` {#tweedie}

::: {.callout-warning title="TODO — could not introspect"}
This name is an alias / re-export / dynamically-built object; its
signature can't be read from source. Document it by hand.
:::

## `GLMResult` {#GLMResult}

*decorated:* `@register_result(children=('coef', 'cov_unscaled', 'dispersion', 'deviance', 'null_deviance', 'log_lik'), aux=('family', 'n_obs', 'rank'))`, `@dataclass(frozen=True)`

```python
class GLMResult
```

Per-element GLM fit output.

*TODO: class overview.*


### Methods

```python
dof_resid(self) -> float
```

```python
n_params(self) -> int
```

Number of estimated parameters (coefficients + a dispersion).

## `glm_fit` {#glm_fit}

```python
glm_fit(Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, family: Union[str, Family]=GAUSSIAN, weights: Optional[Float[Array, 'N']]=None, n_iter: int=25, ridge: float=0.0, block: Optional[int]=None) -> GLMResult
```

Fit a mass-univariate GLM: shared design ``X``, per-element responses.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `predict` {#predict}

```python
predict(result: GLMResult, X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, type: PredictType='response') -> Float[Array, 'V N']
```

Per-element prediction on a (new) design ``X``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `t_contrast` {#t_contrast}

```python
t_contrast(result: GLMResult, contrast: Float[Array, 'p'], *, cov: Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']]=None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]
```

Per-element t-test of a linear contrast ``c^T beta``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `f_contrast` {#f_contrast}

```python
f_contrast(result: GLMResult, contrast: Float[Array, 'm p'], *, cov: Optional[Float[Array, '... p p']]=None) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V'], float, float]
```

Per-element F-test of a multi-row contrast ``C beta = 0``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `sandwich_cov` {#sandwich_cov}

```python
sandwich_cov(result: GLMResult, Y: Float[Array, 'V N'], X: Float[Array, 'N p'], *, kind: HCKind='HC3', groups: Optional[Int[Array, 'N']]=None, weights: Optional[Float[Array, 'N']]=None) -> Float[Array, 'V p p']
```

Robust (sandwich) coefficient covariance for a fitted GLM.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `r_squared` {#r_squared}

```python
r_squared(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element ``R^2`` (Gaussian) / deviance explained (general).

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `adj_r_squared` {#adj_r_squared}

```python
adj_r_squared(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element adjusted ``R^2`` (Gaussian).

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `deviance_explained` {#deviance_explained}

```python
deviance_explained(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element fraction of null deviance explained: ``1 - dev / null_dev``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `log_likelihood` {#log_likelihood}

```python
log_likelihood(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element maximised log-likelihood.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `aic` {#aic}

```python
aic(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element Akaike information criterion ``-2 ll + 2 k``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `bic` {#bic}

```python
bic(result: GLMResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```

Per-element Bayesian information criterion ``-2 ll + k log N``.

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*

## `compare_models` {#compare_models}

```python
compare_models(full: GLMResult, reduced: GLMResult, *, test: CompareTest='auto') -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'V'], Float[Array, 'V']]
```

Per-element nested-model comparison (ModelArray ``full vs. reduced``).

**Parameters** — *TODO: document each parameter.*

**Returns** — *TODO.*
